The PermissionToSignInMethod class represents the mapping between a permission and a sign-in method.

PrintAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
The sets of attributes for requesting a print. An instance of this class is created using one of the builders.
PrintAttributes.AutoFit - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of the configuration of auto fit
PrintAttributes.CollateMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of Collate
PrintAttributes.ColorMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of the color mode for printing.
PrintAttributes.DocumentFormat - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of Document Format
PrintAttributes.Duplex - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of duplex mode for printing.

A collection of finishings
PrintAttributes.Orientation - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of Orientation
PrintAttributes.OutputBin - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer

PrintAttributes.PaperSize - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer

PrintAttributes.PaperSource - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer

Base builder for common print attributes
PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an image residing on the external server and available by HTTP(S) URL.
PrintAttributes.PrintFromStorageBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
Builder for creating PrintAttributes to print the files from source.
PrintAttributes.PrintFromStreamBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an data from provided input stream.
PrintAttributes.PrintFromUsbBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an file residing on the external USB storage.
PrintAttributes.PrintQuality - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of Print-quality (IPP values - draft: 3, Normal: 4, High: 5)
PrintAttributes.Source - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
The source for file to print.
PrintAttributes.StapleMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
A collection of Staple Mode, this option will be ignored if Finishings option is enabled
PrintAttributesCaps - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.printer
Sets of attributes provided by the device when requesting a print.

PrinterService provides an easy to use interface to initiate printing related built-in tasks.

PrinterStatus provides an interface to retrieve device status details

Color Mode = DEFAULT
Duplex = DEFAULT
Copies = 1

Duplex = DEFAULT
Copies = 1
